message:
Add conformance benchmarks and rule/table test infrastructure

Benchmark additions (render_bench.rs):
- benchmark_conformance_text: plain, styled, colored text
- benchmark_conformance_rule: simple and titled rules
- benchmark_conformance_table: simple and with-lines tables
- benchmark_conformance_panel: simple panel rendering

Conformance module changes (tests/conformance/mod.rs):
- Export rule_tests and table_tests submodules
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to normalize_output and outputs_match utils

Test additions (conformance_test.rs):
- Rule conformance tests: no_title, with_title, custom_char, alignments
- Table conformance tests: simple, no_header, with_lines, single_column
- Aggregate test runners for all standard test cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
